title: Nicola Spring Patterned Plant Pots - Assorted - 3 Pack - 14cm Porcelain Indoor Ceramic Planter with Drainage Holes Outdoor Garden Flower Pots for House & Garden Flowers
features: Unique Hand-Printed Design: Each Ceramic Plant Pot features a hand-printed pattern inspired by Japanese 'Wabi-sabi' principles, making every pot one-of-a-kind with a personal touch that adds a zen aesthetic to any space.

Durable Porcelain Construction: Crafted from high-quality porcelain, these pots are both robust and durable, making them perfect for use in a variety of environments, from your home and office to your garden or patio, ensuring long-lasting use.

Perfect Size for Versatility: With a diameter of 14cm and a height of 12.5cm, these pots offer the ideal size to accommodate a variety of plants, flowers, or foliage. The 1L capacity allows for easy growth and nourishment for your greenery.

Indoor and Outdoor Use: These versatile pots are designed to thrive both indoors and outdoors, so whether you're sprucing up your living room, office, or garden, they will add a touch of natural beauty wherever they are placed.

Handmade and One-of-a-Kind: The handmade nature of the printed pattern ensures that each pot is uniquely yours, as no two pieces are exactly the same, making them special and individual pieces of functional art for your home or office.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to pinatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! Hand-printed Crockery Crafted from high quality porcelain, our Nicola Spring hand printed plant pot range lends an immediate traditional touch to any décor. Each piece has been lovingly decorated with a floral pattern inspired by classic Japanese print design. Since each pattern is applied by hand, every cup, mug and saucer made is truly unique to you! With a wide variety of matching kitchenware and dining crockery available you can be sure that Nicola Spring has everything you need to create your ideal home. Durable porcelain - Incredibly tough, won't shatter if dropped or knocked. Drainage hole in base - Reduces risk of over-watering. Comes with matching drip tray - No mess; perfect for indoor as well as outdoor use. Hand-printed - A truly unique piece of crockery.
